arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund might hire ex-Bayern Munich manager Niko Kovać
arts.sum: After a humiliating 2-1 loss to Bologna in the Champions League, including conceding twice in the same minute, Borussia Dortmund has sacked Nuri Şahin and is on the lookout for a new coach. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Kompany speaks highly of new Bayern signing
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany has revealed what he sees as the strengths of Bayern Munich's new signing Tom Bischof.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord fans banned from Lille UCL match
arts.sum: Feyenoord supporters have been banned by French authorities from travelling to Lille for next week's final UEFA Champions League group game between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Upamecano keen to extend Bayern deal
arts.sum: Dayot Upamecano is open to the idea of extending his contract with Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany “campaigning” for Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s transfer interest in young Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens could be heating up. But what is it about Dortmund that they cannot seem to hold onto a talented young attacking prospect?

arts.ttl: Dutch “hooligans” light up Bayern Munich hotel with fireworks overnight
arts.sum: Ultra group RJK lit up the sky with fireworks outside Bayern Munich’s team hotel as players were sleeping: Bayern Munich did not exactly receive a warm welcome from some Feyenoord fans ahead of its Champions League showdown later today.

arts.ttl: Peretz explains decision to stay at Bayern amid interest from other clubs
arts.sum: Daniel Peretz has explained why he has decided not to leave Bayern Munich this month despite interest from a number of clubs.

arts.ttl: Santiago Gimenez reportedly agrees terms with AC Milan
arts.sum: Santiago Gimenez (23) has reportedly set his sights on a winter transfer to AC Milan, as per La Gazzetta dello Sport (via VoetbalPrimeur).

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala offers update on Bayern Munich contract
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala’s new Bayern Munich contract could be finalised by the beginning of February, according to kicker, bringing an end to months of negotiations. Speaking ahead of the club’s Champions…

arts.ttl: Report: Joshua Kimmich “taking time” before Bayern Munich decision
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is inching towards closing the deal with star left-back Alphonso Davies, but may need to wait a little bit longer with another big-time veteran on an expiring contract: Joshua Kimmich. The Bayern No. 6 has options, and although it looks good for Bayern, Kimmich may size up the field before choosing.
